properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v1 v2 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are hungry Lord for Your presence We are thirsty Lord for Your truth We are desperate Lord for Your Spirit We are waiting here for You to move For You to move

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We invite You in this place We invite You with our praise Holy Spirit have Your way Have Your way

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come Holy Spirit come

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come ignite the fire within Let our passion rise again We will never be the same We are changed
